title: Tech Events Aggregator Input
description: Scrape tech events from Luma and Partiful with keyword and location filters.

sources.title: Sources to scrape
sources.description: Which platforms to scrape: 'luma', 'partiful', or both. Default: ["luma", "partiful"].

city.title: City
city.description: City to filter by (e.g. 'San Francisco', 'New York')

tags.title: Event tags filter
tags.description: Only return events matching these auto-tags. Options: hackathon, demo-day, investor-dinner, conference, workshop, networking, other

maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum total events to return. Default: 100.
